name: F1 R.A.W.
overview:
Formula 1™ is the world’s most glamorous sport, yet one built upon ‘strategy’ refined to the absolute limit. Victory or defeat is not decided by speed alone. Strategy, data, and the driver’s will. The moment these elements intersect in a world measured in hundredths of a second, the outcome begins to unfold.

This programme delves into the ‘heart’ of the race, rather than its surface, from three perspectives: Realtime, Analytical and Witness.

Emotions, logic and tactical manoeuvring. We reveal everything about F1™ in its raw, unfiltered form.
